modelFamily: L2-regularized weighted logistic regression for rare events
firstDifferencePolicy: causal one-month difference; first available difference is zero

decisionThresholdPolicy.objective: maximum F1 among thresholds with recall >= 0.50; tie-break by lower Brier score then higher threshold

probabilityCalibration: none in v1; raw logistic probabilities are evaluated with Brier score, log loss and calibration table
labelUse: NBER labels are used only in outer-train fitting and nested inner validation; outer OOS labels never affect fitting, threshold or features.
outerOosPolicy: Forbidden for selection or parameter changes; optional diagnostic only after implementation and config hashes are frozen.
selectionPolicy: The declared threshold list is the only inner search. Feature list, L2 penalty, class-weight cap and optimizer cannot change after validation.
limitations: The available recession labels remain scarce and coefficient estimates may be unstable.
Class weighting changes the fitted objective and does not by itself guarantee calibrated probabilities.
